storage.title: Storage
storage.subtitle: Manage Borg repositories
storage.noRepositoriesForProfile: No repositories for this SMB profile
storage.unassignedRepositories: Some SMB repositories could not be assigned to a profile.

check.title: Manual Borg check
check.quickHint: Standard check with progress indication. Fastest mode for routine checks.
check.verboseHint: Shows additional check steps and details in the log. Runtime is similar to Quick.
check.verifyDataHint: Full verification of data blocks. Highest assurance, significantly longer runtime, and higher I/O load.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Start and monitor backup jobs
jobs.workspaceSubtitle: Assigned backup jobs and operating state
jobs.noLocationJobs: No jobs are assigned to this location.
jobs.empty: No backup jobs have been created yet.
jobs.dockerWarning: All Docker containers will be stopped and restarted after the backup.
jobs.vmWarning: Running VMs will be shut down and restarted after the backup.
jobs.liveLogInfo: Log output will be shown live in the browser.
jobs.deleteDescription: Delete job “{name}”? This action cannot be undone.
jobs.deleteKeepsRepository: The job will be removed from the UI. Repository data will be retained.
jobs.deleteArtifacts: Also delete related files (status, logs, restore test)

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.dayOfMonthHint: Maximum 28 to avoid invalid monthly schedules
schedule.cronFormat: Format: minute hour day month weekday

wizard.stopDockerDescription: Stop Docker before the backup and restart it afterwards
wizard.shutdownVmsDescription: Shut down running VMs before the backup and restart them afterwards

wizard.helpExample:

Backup of the most important photo directories.

- Source: /mnt/user/Photos
- Target: storagebox

wizard.validationStorageRequired: No storage profile available. Create one under Settings.
wizard.scriptlessInfo: Execution uses job metadata through the scriptless Phase 4 runner.

flowSteps.resourceLocksAcquire: Acquire resource locks (repository, optional Docker/VM control)

wizard.remoteRepoUnavailable: Remote repository is not available or could not be checked.

restore.title: Browse & Restore
restore.subtitle: Guided wizard with fixed steps
restore.jobSidebarHint: Available jobs are grouped by location on the left.
restore.targetModeSubtitle: Set the source and target before the precheck.
restore.targetRestrictionHint: The target path is validated by the server. Restoring outside /mnt/user is not allowed.
restore.selectionReady: The selection is ready for the precheck.
restore.precheckVerdictOk: The restore can be started safely
restore.precheckVerdictOkDetail: The target and dry run completed successfully.
restore.precheckVerdictFailedDetail: At least one safety check failed.
restore.emptyDescription: Select a job first. The wizard will then guide you through every step.
restore.selectionHelp: Note: the ⬇ icon downloads a file immediately. The ✓ icon selects a file or directory for restoration. Only one item can be selected at a time.
restore.directoryHint: The directory and its contents will be restored.
restore.fileHint: A single file will be restored.
restore.name: Name
restore.elementSelected: Item selected. Use "Next" to continue to target & mode.
restore.precheckInputsMissing: Select an archive and an item, then enter a target directory.
restore.targetRestriction: The target path must be below /mnt/user.
restore.precheckSuccess: Precheck successful. Review and confirm the summary.
restore.confirmPrecheckFirst: Run and confirm a successful precheck first.
restore.wait: Wait until the restore has completed.
restore.confirmModalDescription: Review the details and confirm the restore.
restore.downloadWarning: Note: the browser may remain busy during large downloads.

restoreTests.title: Restore tests
restoreTests.subtitle: Verify that backups can be restored
restoreTests.planWorkspaceSubtitle: Manage intervals, test levels, and due dates
restoreTests.summarySubtitle: Restore-test policy across the selected jobs
restoreTests.runDueTitle: Starts only due scheduled tests, not every job.
restoreTests.hintsIntro: Restore tests can take a long time depending on archive size and file types.
restoreTests.hintsPolicy: Planning & policy per job is the central control. This page runs the due plan and displays its results.
restoreTests.confirmDescription: The test run will start now.
restoreTests.runSummaryDue: All due jobs with the Scheduled policy will run.
restoreTests.runSummaryPolicy: Each job uses the level and interval from its policy.
restoreTests.noDueJobs: No scheduled restore tests are due. Their interval or schedule has not been reached. Individual jobs can be started manually with Test now under Planning & policy.
restoreTests.planLoadFailed: The plan could not be loaded.
restoreTests.noJobsForSelection: No jobs found for this selection.
restoreTests.noFilteredReports: No test reports match the current filter.
restoreTests.allStepsPassed: All {count} test steps completed without deviations.
restoreTests.stepsNeedAttention: At least one test step requires attention.
restoreTests.stepsSubtitle: Technical sequence of the restore evidence

failures.RT_TIMEOUT: The restore test exceeded its time limit.
failures.RT_PERMISSION_DENIED: The restore test lacks required permissions.
failures.RT_DISK_FULL: The restore test does not have enough disk space.
failures.RT_NETWORK_ERROR: The network or SSH connection failed.
failures.RT_ARCHIVE_MISSING: No archive was found in the repository.
failures.RT_SMB_MOUNT_FAILED: The SMB share could not be mounted.
failures.RT_METADATA_CHECK_FAILED: The archive metadata could not be checked.
failures.RT_UNKNOWN: The restore test failed for an unknown reason.

health.title: System health & migration
health.cifsAvailable: Kernel module available (loads on first mount)
health.jobChecksPlausible: Repository URIs, source paths, passphrases, and profile references are locally plausible.
health.registryOk: Setup, schema comparison, and cleanup currently require no action.
health.dryRunPlan: Dry run: {count} keys will be {mode}; backup/rollback is planned.

jobErrors.storagebox_repo_not_ssh: Storagebox repository is not an ssh:// URI
jobErrors.storagebox_repo_port_slash: Storagebox repository URI is missing a slash after the port

health.registryJobsDirMissing: The job metadata directory is missing.
health.registryRuntimePending: Evidence of storage path migration is missing.
health.registryRuntimeFailed: Storage path migration failed or is incomplete.
health.registrySchemaComplete: backup.conf contains all current schema keys.
health.registryCleanupPresent: Legacy/deprecated keys exist and can be cleaned up.
